name: python3-django-fieldsignals
title: python3-django-fieldsignals
summary: help to tell when the fields on your model have changed (Python 3)
description:
help to tell when the fields on your model have changed (Python 3)
This package contains django-fieldsignals: it simply makes it easy to tell
when the fields on your model have changed.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-django-fieldsignals because help to tell when the fields on your model have changed (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-django-fieldsignals as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-django-fieldsignals with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-django-fieldsignals --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
